metadata.title: LaneFindingWithBundle — delegated finding with ADR-109 context bundle

description: LaneFindingItem extended with an ADR-109 (#653) context bundle. Returned by GET /v1/lane/{finding_id} (detail endpoint). Inherits all LaneFindingItem fields and adds the bundle enrichment for operator action without separate intent queries. Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (#366). Source: src/api/v1/schemas.py, class LaneFindingWithBundle.

id.description: UUID of the blackboard_entries row (inherited from LaneFindingItem).

payload.description: Raw blackboard entry payload — AuditFinding shape (inherited from LaneFindingItem).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC creation timestamp (inherited from LaneFindingItem).

bundle.description: LaneBundle (contracts.lane_bundle) — rule metadata and remediation guidance enrichment.
